prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SWV16LFLARS-ONE-YLLW-3 Product Type: APPAREL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Work Safety Vest 16 LED Flashing Lights Reflective Strips Illuminated Description: A Safety Vest is a necessity on many job sites but they can also be a precautionary consumer item that is very important for safety while out of doors at night.

It is important to be visible to passing vehicles while biking, walking, running, or working. This 16 LED safety vest is the most effective way to ensure motorists will know you are there. The vest includes 2" wide reflective strips that will shine bright whenever a vehicle's headlights hit them.

Unlike most safety vests, this model has LEDs that flash red on the front and back of the vest, ensuring you will be seen regardless of whether or not headlights are shining on you.

Constructed from polyester mesh, this item is lightweight and breathable. The vest takes 3 AA batteries (not included) and has an on/off switch so you can save power when the extra visibility of the LEDs isn't needed. Search Terms: construction bikers cyclists safety vest Features: - Great For Job Sites or Exercising Safety - Mode: on/off (on=Flashing LED); Operates on 3AA Batteries (not included) - Saftey: LED 16 Red; 2" Yellow Reflective Strips - Dimensions: 25.5" x 26.5" - Construction: ANSI Materials === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 16 LED Yellow Reflective Safety Vest

anthropic.title_differentiation: 16 Red Flashing LEDs, 2 Inch Reflective Strips, Lightweight Mesh, Battery Operated, High Visibility

openai.title_differentiation: 16 Red Flashing LEDs, 2" Reflective Strips, 3 AA Battery Operation, Lightweight Mesh, ANSI Materials
